infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: ViralCut uses your contacts to help you tag and share videos with people you know.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ViralCut needs microphone access to record audio for your videos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ViralCut uses your location to suggest the best times to post based on your timezone.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: ViralCut uses Face ID to keep your account secure.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: ViralCut needs calendar access to schedule your video posts at the right time.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: ViralCut uses reminders to notify you when it's time to post your scheduled videos.

plugins.photosPermission: ViralCut needs access to your photo library to save your edited video.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: ViralCut needs permission to save your edited video before opening Instagram.

plugins.photosPermission: ViralCut needs access to your photo library to select videos for editing and publishing.
plugins.cameraPermission: ViralCut needs access to your camera to record videos directly.
